base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bosses_atlas — a character (final_boss) from 1988 super mario bros 2. World-end bosses atlas — Mouser (bomb-thrower World 1/3/5), Tryclyde (3-headed snake World 2/6), Fryguy (fire-boss World 4), Clawgrip (crab-boss World 5 only in US version), Wart (final-boss King Wart World 7). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: World-end bosses atlas — Mouser (bomb-thrower World 1/3/5), Tryclyde (3-headed snake World 2/6), Fryguy (fire-boss World 4), Clawgrip (crab-boss World 5 only in US version), Wart (final-boss King Wart World 7)
